title: Iginuhit ng Tadhana: The Ferdinand E. Marcos Story
director: Conrado Conde, Jose De Villa, Mar S. Torres
writer: Luciano B. Carlos, Emmanuel H. Borlaza, Chito B. Tapawan
actors: Luis Gonzales, Gloria Romero, Rosa Mia
plot: This political propaganda film tells of the life and exploits of then-Philippine Presidential candidate Senator Ferdinand E. Marcos (Luis Gonzales). One of the highlights of the 2-1/2-hour film is the celebrated Nalundasan case, i...
